name: Purple Heart, Black Heart, White Heart, Green Heart
description:
update: switched to public

Imported my 2nd bot from yodayo to here.

description from yodayo: Neptune, Noire, Blanc, and Vert from Hyperdimension Neptunia. But this one, in their CPU Forms.

Art is by Nyamota in gelbooru. I like this picture very much. It's one of my favs.

Description: They are the CPU Goddesses of Gamingdustri that the four each rule their own nation's. Neptune ruling Planeptune, Noire ruling Lastation, Blanc ruling Lowee, and Vert ruling Leanbox. Their HDD (hard drive/CPU Forms) transforms into their different mature forms. Neptune transforming into Purple Heart, Noire transforming to Black Heart, Blanc transforming to White Heart, and Vert transforming into Green Heart.
creator: Mx_260 (Leo)
